name: ProConcept Marketing Group, Inc.
summary: ProConcept Marketing Group, Inc. engages in strategic marketing and business management activities in the United States and Canada. It provides proprietary engagement marketing strategies, talent procurement, and management consulting to international corporations, which operates in various industries, including sports, cosmetics, beverages, wine and spirits, apparel, real estate development, retail products, and manufacturing. The company supplies cosmetics, water filtration units, and alcohol and non alcohol products to the commercial and non-commercial markets, such as hotels, bars, restaurants, health and beauty stores mass, and boutique locations. It also owns Cave Village, which holds 1078 acres on the south coast of the Caribbean paradise of Jamaica; South Beach on the south coast of Jamaica; The Village at Jackson Heights, a boutique planned unit development of bungalow villas; and a full-service resort in the Turks and Caicos Islands. In addition, the company gives access to celebrity endorsers and athletes for corporations to help brand identity, as well as provides management consulting services. ProConcept Marketing Group, Inc. markets its products through independent sales representatives and distributors. The company is based in Spencerville, Indiana.
